reviews.comment:
Un vergüenza se llena de gente y # personas atendiendo.un embole cargar combustible... soy socio pero cargo en la Shell es una tortura el ACA de Miramar

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace, it's packed with people and so many staff. It's a real drag getting fuel... I'm a member, but I fill up at Shell; the ACA in Miramar is torture.

reviews.comment:

Recomiendo las medialunas de manteca. Un lujo!

I recommend the butter croissants. A luxury!

reviews.comment:
Es el tercer YPF ACA que visitó en dos días y todos iguales solo sirven para cargar nafta, no tienen para calibrar las gomas y olvídate de pedir medir el aceite o alguna cosa ajena a apretar el gatillo de la manguera del surtidor, te miran con una cara como si les estuvieras pidiendo un riñón, la verdad que de servicentro no tienen nada.

(Translated by Google)
This is the third YPF ACA I've visited in two days, and they're all the same: they're only good for filling up with gas. They don't have tire pressure gauges, and forget about asking them to check your oil or anything other than squeezing the trigger on the pump. They look at you like you're asking for a kidney. Honestly, they're not service stations at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzajZhay1BRRAB
